{{Quote|I'm transportation ... I get us in and out, and fast.|Hurana, Leadership School mercenary squad member|<ref name="Jedi Quest: The School of Fear">''[[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear]]''</ref>}}
'''Hurana''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] student who was a member of a squad of young [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] that trained at the elite [[Leadership School]] of [[Andara/Legends|Andara]] during the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. She was in charge of arranging transportation for the group.

A slight girl with pale gold eyes, Hurana's talent as an aggressive [[Swoop/Legends|swoop-bike]] rider belied her shy nature.

==Biography==
Hurana was the being placed in charge of transportation for a squad of young [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] that studied at the school. During the time that they accepted a mission from the ruler of [[Ieria]], [[Rana Halion]], Hurana was shopping the market for a couple of [[A-6 Interceptor]]s. The other members of the band were [[Gillam Tarturi]], [[Rolai Frac]], [[Tulah]], [[Marit Dice]], and [[Ze]].

During the mission on [[Ieria]], Gillam and the rest of the band pretended to let the young [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] join the squad. Gillam then attempted to murder Skywalker, but Anakin single-handedly defeated all six mercenaries. Marit convinced Hurana, Tulah, and Ze that Gillam had betrayed them and was using them for revenge, not justice. The squad was later taken to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by Anakin, [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]], [[Ferus Olin]], and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], to sort out the lies, betrayals, and criminal activity that had occurred within the group.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear]]'' {{1st}}
